ideation: This animation sequence shows the robot offering assistance, reflecting the meaning of the wheelchair symbol.  The sequence starts with arms at the sides, then moves to a gesture of support, and finally returns to a neutral pose. The robot uses both arms to show readiness to help, not just one arm. The movements are slow and deliberate to show care and attention.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, neutral stance
both arms extend forward, palms up, offering support
arms return to sides, assistance offered
